currentMergeMode: esm + partial runtime overlay

exact: follow-up INFO links when TESConversationData survives
derived: conversation topic linkage when runtime link lists survive
esmOnly: result script source fragments when not present in memory

evidence: Real sample dumps: m_listAddTopics positive on Debug/xex4/xex44/MemDebug; m_listFollowUpInfos positive on Release_MemDebug
nextAction: Treat response text and result-script source as ESM/carved-only unless TESResponse or a stable runtime result-script payload is proven. Current sample dumps positively show runtime add-topic links and MemDebug follow-up INFO links, but do not yet give a stable positive decode for TESConversationData m_listLinkFrom/m_listLinkTo across the validated dump families. On real dumps, INFO enrichment also depends on QUEST_INFO -> ReadRuntimeDialogueInfoFromVA because direct INFO hash-table hits are sparse or absent on some dump families.

currentMergeMode: esm + runtime gap-fill enrichment + map-marker projection
nextAction: Keep working through the remaining high-frequency REFR extras, but keep dump-family drift explicit: stable semantic extras should be validated per dump family instead of assumed universal when the census and semantic decode diverge. Current sample dumps positively decode radius, starting-position, package-start, merchant-container, and leveled-creature extras; starting-world/cell remains implemented but unobserved, and the base Release_Beta dump still lacks a positive merchant-container decode even though sibling beta-family variants do.
